com.mentor.chs.api.dataexchange.teamcenter

Interface IXTeamcenterReportExchangeRegistrar

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin

    public interface IXTeamcenterReportExchangeRegistrar
extends IXPlugin
    You need to implement this interface to register the ReportCreator and the PLMXML Tranformer

    The implementor can register multiple reports with the same transformer or multiple transformer and vice-versa.

    The name of this plugin implementation will be used to populate a menu in Capital tools. Under the menus all the registered report names will be shown as seperate action.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void register(IXTeamcenterReportExchangeRegistrarResult result)
      Register all the Reports and their corresponding PLMXML tranformer.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • register

        void register(IXTeamcenterReportExchangeRegistrarResult result)
        Register all the Reports and their corresponding PLMXML tranformer. For each entry added to the result, there will be corresponding action in Capital tool to generate the report and transform the data using the specified plugins.
        Parameters:
        result - The result object to be populated by the implementor
